name: ERPSMART Builder Capability Removal Contract
purpose: Describe how future capability removal should be analyzed before any runtime changes are implemented.

data_ui.data_retention_rules: Preserve records and custom field values unless an explicit destructive plan is approved.
data_ui.agent_notes: AI may propose metadata changes before publish but must not remove runtime files or fields.

collaboration_content.data_retention_rules: Retain user comments, notes, activity records, and associations unless retention policy allows deletion.
collaboration_content.agent_notes: Collaboration records are user-owned data and must not be deleted casually.

form_layout.data_retention_rules: Form layout metadata can be versioned and archived; future runtime renderer bindings need compatibility checks.
form_layout.agent_notes: Currently metadata-only; future renderer may make removal more complex.

automation_process.data_retention_rules: Retain workflow history, task records, approval logs, email logs, and notification history after runtime engine exists.
automation_process.agent_notes: AI may propose automation metadata but must not execute workflows, send emails, create tasks, or call webhooks.

media_files.data_retention_rules: Preserve uploaded files and media records unless explicit retention/destruction policy is approved.
media_files.agent_notes: File deletion is destructive and must require backup plus explicit approval.

search_import_export.data_retention_rules: Do not delete imported business records when disabling import/export; rebuild search indexes if search is removed.
search_import_export.agent_notes: Operational workflows may depend on import/export even if data tables remain unchanged.
